description: Legal document. Deed of acknowledgment dated 449/1058. Ṣadaqa b. Ṭayyib al-Mayāziri al-Ramlī receives from Ḥasan b. Ishaq al-Isrāʾīlī al-Mayāziri al-Ramlī a loan of 150 dirhams. (Information from Goitein’s index card.) Alternate description (CUDL): Acknowledgment of a debt of 150 silver dirhams that Ṣadaqa b. Ṭayyib al-Ramlī, the maker of waist-cloths, contracted with Ḥasan b. Isḥāq al-Ramlī, the Jewish maker of waist-cloths. Ṣadaqa is paying back his debt and Ḥasan acknowledges the receipt of the money. Dated Ḏū al-Qa‛da 449 AH (= December 1057/January 1058 CE).
description_he: מסמך משפטי. שטר הכרה. תאריך: 449 היג'רה = 1058 לספירה. צדקה ב. טייב אל-מיאזירי מקבל הלוואה של 150 דרהם מחסן ב. יצחק אל-ישראלי
